intent: Write a short 'sleep hygiene on a budget' guide combining storefront products with community behavior tips. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the health-household and home-kitchen categories and collect at least 3 sleep-related products (sleep aid, white-noise or light-block product, bedding/comfort). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/science for posts on what actually improves sleep, caffeine cutoff, or evening habits. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present the storefront picks with a cost and trust summary, (b) integrate at least two behavioral tips from Reddit that are cheaper than any product, (c) conclude with a 3-step action plan (one product, two free habits). Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Product + behavior hybrid conclusion forces real synthesis.
